title: Senior Software Engineer - Ola Cabs - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Ola Cabs - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Ola Cabs in Nashik offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Ola Cabs:
Ola Cabs is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ola Cabs!
